inputs.label: Bit rate (bps)
inputs.businessContext: Data transfer rate in bits per second

inputs.label: Conversion factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor to convert bps to kbps (0.001 for SI standard)

inputs.label: Rounding decimals
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in the converted output

inputs.label: Confirmation bit
inputs.businessContext: Integrity check: set to 1 to proceed with conversion
